atlas v0.5
Back To Movements

Historical Movement

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

功能、工业和几何秩序优先。它把形式服从用途这件事系统化。

Period

1919-1933

Origin

Germany

Why It Matters

今天大量产品站和设计系统网站，仍在延续 Bauhaus 的功能主义、模块化和减少装饰的思想。

Core Traits

先理解这条语言本身

Principles

  • function before ornament
  • industrial clarity
  • geometric reduction
  • modular logic

Watchouts

  • 容易被误做成单纯的冷淡白底
  • 不是所有黑白简洁都等于 Bauhaus

Sample Gallery

历史语言在今天的网页里如何现身

Descendant Families

今天在网页里更接近哪些家族

Web Family

Product Precision Interface

Controlled, engineered, high-clarity product surfaces where state language, spacing, and UI logic outrank atmosphere.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

Best For

AI toolstechnical productsplatform homepages
Open family
Web Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Thesis, evidence, navigation, and labels coexist. The page must remain trustworthy and scannable even when it gets dense.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional ModernismSwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

research hubsdesign systemsguides
Open family
